title: ANC - 7.-ANC is OFF and Transparency is OFF, both without selected values, and during call User sets ANC to ON
scenario: ANC mode does not properly activate with Adaptive value when toggled ON during a call with both ANC and Transparency OFF
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to Home screen and tap on the connected Poly Bluetooth audio device.
3. Go to Device Settings → Audio Settings → ANC / Transparency.
4. Ensure both ANC and Transparency are set to OFF (no values selected).
5. Initiate or join a phone call using the connected Poly device.
6. During the active call, open the Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to Audio Settings → ANC / Transparency.
8. Observe the ANC and Transparency mode options.
10. Observe the ANC and Transparency mode options after the call ends.
expected: When ANC is set to ON during a call: ANC activates with Adaptive value selected, Transparency becomes greyed out/inaccessible. After the call ends: ANC remains active with Adaptive selected, Transparency stays OFF, and the user can toggle between ANC and Transparency modes.
